title: Claude Code Settings (Extended)
description: Extended JSON Schema for Claude Code settings. Includes fields from SchemaStore plus changelog-discovered and undocumented settings. Learn more: https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings
x-source-note: Extends https://json.schemastore.org/claude-code-settings.json with additional fields from CHANGELOG.md

timeout.description: Optional timeout in seconds (default: 600 as of v2.1.3)

async.description: If true, runs in the background without blocking

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs

once.description: Execute hook only once per session

prompt.description: Prompt to evaluate with LLM. Use $ARGUMENTS placeholder for hook input JSON.

model.description: Model to use for evaluation. Defaults to a fast model.

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs

once.description: Execute hook only once per session

prompt.description: Prompt to evaluate with agent. Use $ARGUMENTS placeholder for hook input JSON.

model.description: Model to use for evaluation. Defaults to main model.

statusMessage.description: Custom spinner message displayed while the hook runs

once.description: Execute hook only once per session

hookMatcher.description: Hook matcher configuration with multiple hooks

matcher.description: Optional regex pattern to match. Applicable to most hook events except UserPromptSubmit, Stop, TeammateIdle, and TaskCompleted.

$schema.description: JSON Schema reference for Claude Code settings

apiKeyHelper.description: Path to a script that outputs authentication values

awsCredentialExport.description: Path to a script that exports AWS credentials

awsAuthRefresh.description: Path to a script that refreshes AWS authentication

cleanupPeriodDays.description: Number of days to retain chat transcripts (0 to disable cleanup)

env.description: Environment variables to set for Claude Code sessions. All variables are passed as strings.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: API key sent as X-Api-Key header, typically for the Claude SDK (for interactive usage, run /login)

ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.description: Custom API endpoint URL for Anthropic API (for LLM gateway integration)

ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Custom value for the Authorization header (the value you set here will be prefixed with Bearer)

ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS.description: Custom headers you want to add to the request (in Name: Value format)

ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_HAIKU_MODEL.description: Override the default Haiku-class model. See Model configuration docs. WARNING: Do not set to empty string. Omit entirely to use the default model.

ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_OPUS_MODEL.description: Override the default Opus-class model. See Model configuration docs. WARNING: Do not set to empty string. Omit entirely to use the default model.

ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL.description: Override the default Sonnet-class model. See Model configuration docs. WARNING: Do not set to empty string. Omit entirely to use the default model.

ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_API_KEY.description: API key for Microsoft Foundry authentication

ANTHROPIC_MODEL.description: Name of the model setting to use. See Model Configuration docs. WARNING: Do not set to empty string. Omit entirely to use the default model.

ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL.description: [DEPRECATED] Name of Haiku-class model for background tasks. WARNING: Do not set to empty string. Omit entirely to use the default model.

ANTHROPIC_SMALL_FAST_MODEL_AWS_REGION.description: Override AWS region for the Haiku-class model when using Bedrock

ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_BASE_URL.description: Custom Bedrock gateway URL (for LLM gateway integration)

ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_BASE_URL.description: Custom Vertex AI gateway URL (for LLM gateway integration)

ANTHROPIC_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID.description: GCP project ID for Vertex AI integration

BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Default timeout for long-running bash commands (milliseconds)

BASH_MAX_OUTPUT_LENGTH.description: Maximum number of characters in bash outputs before they are middle-truncated

BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Maximum timeout the model can set for long-running bash commands (milliseconds)

CLAUDE_BASH_MAINTAIN_PROJECT_WORKING_DIR.description: Return to the original working directory after each Bash command. Set any truthy value to enable.

CLAUDE_BASH_NO_LOGIN.description: Skip login shell for BashTool. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.

CLAUDE_CODE_API_KEY_HELPER_TTL_MS.description: Interval in milliseconds at which credentials should be refreshed (when using apiKeyHelper)

CLAUDE_CODE_CLIENT_CERT.description: Path to client certificate file for mTLS authentication

CLAUDE_CODE_CLIENT_KEY.description: Path to client private key file for mTLS authentication

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_BACKGROUND_TASKS.description: Set to 1 to disable all background task functionality, including run_in_background parameter and Ctrl+B shortcut

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_EXPERIMENTAL_BETAS.description: Set to 1 to disable Anthropic API-specific anthropic-beta headers

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC.description: Equivalent of setting DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER, DISABLE_BUG_COMMAND, DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING, and DISABLE_TELEMETRY

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TERMINAL_TITLE.description: Set to 1 to disable automatic terminal title updates based on conversation context

CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TELEMETRY.description: Enable OpenTelemetry (OTEL) telemetry for Claude Code monitoring

CLAUDE_CODE_EXIT_AFTER_STOP_DELAY.description: Auto-exit delay in milliseconds after session stop (for SDK/headless mode). Set to -1 to disable auto-exit.

CLAUDE_CODE_FILE_READ_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Override the default token limit for file reads. Useful when you need to read larger files in full

CLAUDE_CODE_HIDE_ACCOUNT_INFO.description: Set to 1 to hide your email address and organization name from the Claude Code UI

CLAUDE_CODE_IDE_SKIP_AUTO_INSTALL.description: Skip auto-installation of IDE extensions. Set any truthy value to enable.

CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Set the maximum number of output tokens for most requests

CLAUDE_CODE_OTEL_HEADERS_HELPER_DEBOUNCE.description: Interval for refreshing dynamic OpenTelemetry headers in milliseconds (default: 1740000 / 29 minutes)

CLAUDE_CODE_PROXY_RESOLVES_HOSTS.description: Trust proxy to resolve hostnames (set to 'true' when using enterprise proxies)

CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE.description: Flag indicating Claude Code is running in a remote/web environment

CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL.description: Override automatic shell detection. Useful when your login shell differs from your preferred working shell

CLAUDE_CODE_SHELL_PREFIX.description: Command prefix to wrap all bash commands (for logging or auditing)

CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH.description: Skip AWS authentication for Bedrock (when using an LLM gateway)

CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_FOUNDRY_AUTH.description: Skip Azure authentication for Microsoft Foundry (when using an LLM gateway)

CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_VERTEX_AUTH.description: Skip Google authentication for Vertex (when using an LLM gateway)

CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL.description: Override the model used for subagents. See Model configuration docs. WARNING: Do not set to empty string. Omit entirely to use the default model.

CLAUDE_CODE_TMPDIR.description: Override the temp directory used for internal temp files. Claude Code appends /claude/ to this path. WARNING: An empty string may cause temp files to be written to the project root instead of the system temp directory. Omit this variable entirely to use the default.

CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK.description: Use Amazon Bedrock as the LLM provider

CLAUDE_CODE_USE_FOUNDRY.description: Use Microsoft Foundry as the LLM provider

CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX.description: Use Google Vertex AI as the LLM provider

CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE.description: Override the auto-compaction threshold percentage (0-100). Default triggers at ~95% context usage.

CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR.description: Customize where Claude Code stores its configuration and data files. WARNING: An empty string may cause session state (file-history/, projects/, image-cache/, history.jsonl) to be written to the project root instead of ~/.claude/. Omit this variable entirely to use the default.

CLAUDE_ENV_FILE.description: Path to a shell script to source before each Bash command (for persistent environment setup)

CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR.description: Project directory path available in hook environment (set by Claude Code)
CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR.x-note: Read-only variable set by Claude Code for hooks

CLAUDE_SESSION_ID.description: String substitution for skills to access current session ID (read-only, set by Claude Code)
CLAUDE_SESSION_ID.x-note: Read-only variable set by Claude Code

DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER.description: Set to 1 to disable automatic updates

DISABLE_BUG_COMMAND.description: Set to 1 to disable the /bug command

DISABLE_COST_WARNINGS.description: Set to 1 to disable cost warning messages

DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING.description: Set to 1 to opt out of Sentry error reporting

DISABLE_INTERLEAVED_THINKING.description: Opt out of interleaved thinking mode. Set to '1' or 'true' to disable.

DISABLE_NON_ESSENTIAL_MODEL_CALLS.description: Set to 1 to disable model calls for non-critical paths like flavor text

DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING.description: Set to 1 to disable prompt caching for all models (takes precedence over per-model settings)

DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_HAIKU.description: Set to 1 to disable prompt caching for Haiku models

DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_OPUS.description: Set to 1 to disable prompt caching for Opus models

DISABLE_PROMPT_CACHING_SONNET.description: Set to 1 to disable prompt caching for Sonnet models

DISABLE_TELEMETRY.description: Set to 1 to opt out of Statsig telemetry (note: Statsig events do not include user data like code, file paths, or bash commands)

ENABLE_LSP_TOOL.description: Enable LSP (Language Server Protocol) tool functionality for code intelligence features like go-to-definition and find-references.

ENABLE_TOOL_SEARCH.description: Controls MCP tool search. Values: auto (default, enables at 10% context), auto:N (custom threshold), true (always on), false (disabled)

FORCE_AUTOUPDATE_PLUGINS.description: Allow plugin autoupdate even when main auto-updater is disabled. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.

HTTP_PROXY.description: Specify HTTP proxy server for network connections

HTTPS_PROXY.description: Specify HTTPS proxy server for network connections

IS_DEMO.description: Hide email and organization from UI. Useful for streaming/recording. Set to '1' or 'true' to enable.

MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS.description: Maximum number of tokens allowed in MCP tool responses (default: 25000, warning at 10000)

MAX_THINKING_TOKENS.description: Override the extended thinking token budget. Default: 31999. Set to 0 to disable thinking.

MCP_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout in milliseconds for MCP server startup

MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT.description: Timeout in milliseconds for MCP tool execution

NO_PROXY.description: List of domains and IPs to which requests will be directly issued, bypassing proxy

SLASH_COMMAND_TOOL_CHAR_BUDGET.description: Maximum number of characters for slash command metadata shown to the Skill tool (default: 15000)

USE_BUILTIN_RIPGREP.description: Set to 0 to use system-installed rg instead of the rg bundled with Claude Code

VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_3_5_HAIKU.description: Override region for Claude 3.5 Haiku when using Vertex AI

VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_3_5_SONNET.description: Override region for Claude 3.5 Sonnet when using Vertex AI

VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_3_7_SONNET.description: Override region for Claude 3.7 Sonnet when using Vertex AI

VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_4_0_OPUS.description: Override region for Claude 4.0 Opus when using Vertex AI

VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_4_0_SONNET.description: Override region for Claude 4.0 Sonnet when using Vertex AI

VERTEX_REGION_CLAUDE_4_1_OPUS.description: Override region for Claude 4.1 Opus when using Vertex AI

ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_BASE_URL.description: Full base URL for the Microsoft Foundry resource endpoint

ANTHROPIC_FOUNDRY_RESOURCE.description: Microsoft Foundry resource name for API routing

CLAUDE_CODE_ADDITIONAL_DIRECTORIES_CLAUD.description: Load CLAUDE.md files from --add-dir directories. Set to '1' to enable.

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_AUTO_MEMORY.description: Disable automatic memory (CLAUDE.md) updates. Set to '1' to disable.

CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_FEEDBACK_SURVEY.description: Disable session quality feedback surveys. Set to '1' to disable.

CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL.description: Set the effort level for model responses: low, medium, or high

CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_PROMPT_SUGGESTION.description: Enable or disable prompt suggestions. Set to '0' or 'false' to disable.

CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TASKS.description: Set to 'false' to temporarily revert to the TODO list. Default: true.

CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS.description: Enable experimental agent teams feature. Set to '1' to enable.

CLAUDE_CODE_PLAN_MODE_REQUIRED.description: When set to 'true', Claude Code operates in read-only plan mode and requires plan approval before making changes. Read-only, only ever set to 'true' by Claude Code.
CLAUDE_CODE_PLAN_MODE_REQUIRED.x-note: Read-only variable set by Claude Code

CLAUDE_CODE_TASK_LIST_ID.description: Share a task list across multiple sessions by providing a task list identifier

CLAUDE_CODE_TEAM_NAME.description: Agent team name assigned to this session (read-only, set by Claude Code)
CLAUDE_CODE_TEAM_NAME.x-note: Read-only variable set by Claude Code

DISABLE_INSTALLATION_CHECKS.description: Disable installation warning messages (e.g., outdated Node.js). Set to '1' to disable.

MCP_CLIENT_SECRET.description: OAuth client secret for authenticating with MCP servers that use OAuth

MCP_OAUTH_CALLBACK_PORT.description: Port number for the OAuth redirect callback when authenticating with MCP servers

AWS_REGION.description: AWS region for Bedrock. Required when using CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK=1.

CLOUD_ML_REGION.description: Google Cloud region for Vertex AI. Required when using CLAUDE_CODE_USE_VERTEX=1. Values: 'global', or specific region names.

AWS_PROFILE.description: AWS profile name for SSO authentication with Bedrock

AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID.description: AWS access key ID for Bedrock authentication (standard AWS credential chain)

AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY.description: AWS secret access key for Bedrock authentication (standard AWS credential chain)

AWS_SESSION_TOKEN.description: AWS session token for temporary credentials with Bedrock

NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS.description: Path to custom CA certificate bundle for enterprise HTTPS connections

CLAUDE_HOOK_DEBUG.description: Enable debug mode for hook dispatcher (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level for hook dispatcher output

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_VERBOSITY.description: Verbosity level for hook log entries

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_EVENTS_ENABLED.description: Master switch to enable event logging for all hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_PRETOOLUSE_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for PreToolUse hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_POSTTOOLUSE_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for PostToolUse hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_POSTTOOLUSEFAILURE_ENABL.description: Enable logging for PostToolUseFailure hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_USERPROMPTSUBMIT_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for UserPromptSubmit hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_STOP_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for Stop hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_SUBAGENTSTOP_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for SubagentStop hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_SUBAGENTSTART_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for SubagentStart hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_SESSIONSTART_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for SessionStart hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_SESSIONEND_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for SessionEnd hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_PRECOMPACT_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for PreCompact hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_NOTIFICATION_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for Notification hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_PERMISSIONREQUEST_ENABLE.description: Enable logging for PermissionRequest hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_TASKCOMPLETED_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for TaskCompleted hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_TEAMMATEIDLE_ENABLED.description: Enable logging for TeammateIdle hook events (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_ROTATION_ENABLED.description: Enable log file rotation for hook event logs (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_ROTATION_MAX_SIZE_MB.description: Maximum log file size in megabytes before rotation

CLAUDE_HOOK_LOG_RETENTION_MAX_AGE_DAYS.description: Maximum age in days for retained log files

CLAUDE_HOOK_MARKDOWN_LINT_ENABLED.description: Enable markdown linting hook on Edit/Write operations (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_ENFORCEMENT_MARKDOWN_LINT.description: Enforcement level for markdown lint violations

CLAUDE_HOOK_INJECT_CURRENT_DATE_ENABLED.description: Inject current date into session context (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_INJECT_CITATION_CONTEXT_ENAB.description: Inject citation context for source attribution (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_SUGGEST_DOCS_DELEGATION_ENAB.description: Suggest docs-management skill delegation for documentation tasks (0/1)

CLAUDE_HOOK_SUGGEST_GEMINI_DOCS_ENABLED.description: Suggest Gemini docs skill for Gemini CLI documentation tasks (0/1)

includeCoAuthoredBy.description: Deprecated -- use 'attribution' instead. Whether to include Claude's co-authored by attribution in commits and PRs (defaults to true)

allow.description: List of permission rules for allowed operations

deny.description: List of permission rules for denied operations

ask.description: List of permission rules that should always prompt for confirmation

defaultMode.description: Default permission mode when Claude Code needs access

disableBypassPermissionsMode.description: Disable the ability to bypass permission prompts

additionalDirectories.description: Additional directories to include in the permission scope

model.description: Override the default model used by Claude Code

effortLevel.description: Effort level for model responses. Controls adaptive reasoning depth on supported models (currently Opus 4.6)

plansDirectory.description: Customize where plan files are stored. Defaults to ~/.claude/plans/

showTurnDuration.description: Whether to show turn duration messages (e.g., 'Cooked for 1m 6s'). Defaults to true.

respectGitignore.description: Control whether @-mention file picker respects .gitignore patterns

enableAllProjectMcpServers.description: Whether to automatically approve all MCP servers in the project

enabledMcpjsonServers.description: List of approved MCP servers from .mcp.json

disabledMcpjsonServers.description: List of rejected MCP servers from .mcp.json

serverName.description: Name of the MCP server that users are allowed to configure

allowedMcpServers.description: Enterprise allowlist of MCP servers. If undefined, all servers allowed. If empty array, no servers allowed. Denylist takes precedence.

serverName.description: Name of the MCP server that is explicitly blocked

deniedMcpServers.description: Enterprise denylist of MCP servers. Denylist takes precedence over allowlist.

mcpToolSearch.description: MCP tool search mode. 'auto' enables automatic discovery (default since v2.1.7). 'auto:N' sets context threshold percentage (0-100). 'off' disables.
mcpToolSearch.x-note: Default changed to auto mode with 10% threshold in v2.1.7. auto:N syntax added in v2.1.9

hooks.description: Custom commands to run before/after tool executions

PreToolUse.description: Hooks that run before tool calls. Can return additionalContext to model (v2.1.9+)

PostToolUse.description: Hooks that run after tool completion

UserPromptSubmit.description: Hooks that run when a user submits a prompt

Stop.description: Hooks that run when agents finish responding

SubagentStop.description: Hooks that run when subagents finish responding

SubagentStart.description: Hooks that run when subagents start (v2.0.43+)

PreCompact.description: Hooks that run before the context is compacted

SessionStart.description: Hooks that run when a new session starts. Receives agent_type in input (v2.1.2+)

SessionEnd.description: Hooks that run when a session ends

PermissionRequest.description: Hooks that run when permission is requested (v2.0.45+)

Setup.description: Hooks that run for repository setup and maintenance operations. Triggered via --init, --init-only, or --maintenance CLI flags (v2.1.10+)

PostToolUseFailure.description: Hooks that run after a tool call fails. Receives tool_name, tool_input, and error in hook input.

TaskCompleted.description: Hooks that run when a task is marked completed. Exit code 2 prevents the task from being marked as completed.

TeammateIdle.description: Hooks that run when an agent team teammate is about to go idle. Exit code 2 keeps the teammate working.

disableAllHooks.description: Disable all hooks and statusLine execution

allowManagedHooksOnly.description: Enterprise setting: When true, only managed hooks (from managed-settings.json) run; all user, project, and plugin hooks are blocked

timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds for status line command execution

statusLine.description: Custom status line display configuration. Receives JSON with context_window.used_percentage and remaining_percentage (v2.1.6+)

enabledPlugins.description: Enabled plugins using plugin-id@marketplace-id format. Example: { "formatter@anthropic-tools": true }

ref.description: Git branch or tag to use
Git branch or tag to use

source.description: Where to fetch the marketplace from

installLocation.description: Local cache path where marketplace manifest is stored

extraKnownMarketplaces.description: Additional marketplaces to make available for this repository

skippedMarketplaces.description: List of marketplace names the user has chosen not to install when prompted

skippedPlugins.description: List of plugin IDs (plugin@marketplace format) the user has chosen not to install when prompted

forceLoginMethod.description: Force a specific login method: 'claudeai' for Claude Pro/Max, 'console' for Console billing

forceLoginOrgUUID.description: Organization UUID to use for OAuth login

otelHeadersHelper.description: Path to a script that outputs OpenTelemetry headers

outputStyle.description: Controls the output style for assistant responses

skipWebFetchPreflight.description: Skip the WebFetch blocklist check for enterprise environments with restrictive security policies

allowUnixSockets.description: Allow Unix domain sockets for local IPC (SSH agent, Docker, etc.)

allowLocalBinding.description: Allow binding to local network addresses (e.g., localhost ports)

httpProxyPort.description: HTTP proxy port to use for network filtering

socksProxyPort.description: SOCKS proxy port to use for network filtering

allowedDomains.description: Domain allowlist for outbound network traffic when sandbox is enabled

allowAllUnixSockets.description: Allow all Unix socket connections instead of specifying individual paths

additionalProperties.description: List of filesystem paths to ignore sandbox violations for

ignoreViolations.description: Map of command patterns to filesystem paths to ignore violations for. Use '*' to match all commands

excludedCommands.description: Commands that should never run in the sandbox (e.g., ['git', 'docker'])

autoAllowBashIfSandboxed.description: Automatically allow bash commands without prompting when they run in the sandbox

enableWeakerNestedSandbox.description: Enable weaker sandbox mode for unprivileged docker environments. Significantly reduces sandbox strength.

allowUnsandboxedCommands.description: Allow commands to run outside the sandbox via dangerouslyDisableSandbox parameter. Default: true.

spinnerTipsEnabled.description: Whether to show tips in the spinner while Claude is working

terminalProgressBarEnabled.description: Whether to show the terminal progress bar during processing

autoUpdatesChannel.description: Auto-updates channel: 'stable' for production releases, 'latest' for newest versions

alwaysThinkingEnabled.description: Whether extended thinking is always enabled (default: false)

companyAnnouncements.description: Company announcements to display at startup (one randomly selected if multiple)

mcpServers.description: User configuration values for MCP servers keyed by server name

pluginConfigs.description: Per-plugin configuration including MCP server user configs, keyed by plugin ID

attribution.description: Control attribution in git commits and PRs

commit.description: Attribution for git commits. Empty string hides attribution.

pr.description: Attribution for pull requests. Empty string hides attribution.

fileSuggestion.description: Custom file suggestion script for @ file autocomplete

command.description: Path to script that handles @ file autocomplete

agent.description: Default agent type to use for sessions

allowManagedPermissionRulesOnly.description: Enterprise setting: When true, prevents user and project permission rules from being applied. Only managed-settings.json permission rules are used.

availableModels.description: Restrict model selection to this list. Affects /model command, --model flag, and Task tool model parameter.

prefersReducedMotion.description: Reduce or disable UI animations for accessibility

spinnerVerbs.description: Customize the spinner verbs shown while Claude is working

mode.description: Whether to append to or replace the default verb list

strictKnownMarketplaces.description: Enterprise managed marketplace allowlist. When set, only these marketplaces are available.

teammateMode.description: How agent team teammates are launched: 'auto' (default), 'in-process', or 'tmux' for separate terminal sessions

x-environment-variables-note: All 132 environment variables (104 official + 28 custom) are defined in properties.env.properties with full descriptions, categories, and metadata. Use env.properties for IntelliSense support.

1.3.0: Fixed agent hook: replaced 'agent' field with 'prompt' per official docs
Added statusMessage, once, async fields to hook handlers per official docs
Added 7 env vars (132 total: 104 official + 28 custom): AWS_REGION, CLOUD_ML_REGION, AWS_PROFILE, AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, AWS_SESSION_TOKEN, NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS
Relaxed CLAUDE_BASH_MAINTAIN_PROJECT_WORKING_DIR and CLAUDE_CODE_IDE_SKIP_AUTO_INSTALL to plain strings
Updated matcher description for broader hook event applicability
Added model field to prompt and agent hook types
1.2.1: Fixed CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_TASKS enum to accept true/false per official docs
Added minLength:1 and empty-string warnings to 6 model name env vars
1.2.0: Added 15 official env vars (125 total: 97 official + 28 custom), 28 custom hook env vars, 3 hook events (PostToolUseFailure, TaskCompleted, TeammateIdle), 8 top-level properties (allowManagedPermissionRulesOnly, availableModels, prefersReducedMotion, spinnerVerbs, strictKnownMarketplaces, teammateMode, sandbox.network.allowedDomains, sandbox.network.allowAllUnixSockets), defaults for 9 boolean properties
